visual_description: The scene shows a dark stone corridor with wooden planks, where a small group of people walks toward the camera in the distance. The camera then focuses on the floor, which is empty until a pale hand emerges from a crack in the wood. The hand reaches out, gripping the edge of the opening as it continues to rise.
